'''CG guardian droids''' were four-legged [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] built by [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. The model was based off of canines.

One was aboard the [[Decimator (Star Destroyer)|''Decimator'']] during [[12-4C-41's droid revolt]].

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' {{1st}}
